Container.Name: Plex-Dupefinder
Container.Overview: Find and remove duplicate media files in your Plex libraries using Sonarr and Radarr quality scoring.[br][br]Features:[br]- Scans Plex for duplicate TV episodes and movies[br]- Scores each file using Sonarr/Radarr quality weights, custom formats, and grab history[br]- Groups duplicates by show with per-show waste totals[br]- Separates same-folder dupes (safe to clean) from different-folder dupes (review carefully)[br]- Bulk select and delete inferior copies directly from the UI[br]- Sort by name, size, or number of duplicates[br][br]Configure your Plex, Sonarr, and Radarr connections in the Settings page after install.
Container.DonateText: If you like my work, please consider a donation!
